lessons.title: Fire and Ice Fundamentals
lessons.description: Learn Black Mage's core element system: Astral Fire for damage, Umbral Ice for MP recovery, and the critical 30-second element timer.
keyPoints: Astral Fire: Boosts Fire spell damage but stops MP regen
Umbral Ice: Rapid MP recovery, reduced Ice spell damage
Element timer is 30 seconds - refreshed by element-aligned spells
Enochian is active whenever you have an element - losing it loses DPS
Fire III and Blizzard III swap between phases instantly at max stacks
tips: Never let your element timer drop - always refresh before 0
Watch the element gauge - it shows your remaining timer

lessons.title: Resource Mastery
lessons.description: Understand BLM's gauge resources: Umbral Hearts for Fire IV efficiency, Polyglot for Xenoglossy, and Astral Soul for Flare Star.
keyPoints: Umbral Hearts (3 max): Generated by Blizzard IV, reduce Fire spell MP cost
Polyglot: Generates every 30s of Enochian, max 2-3 stacks
Polyglot overcapping is a major DPS loss - spend before gaining new stacks
Enter Fire phase with full MP (10,000) for maximum Fire IV casts
tips: Amplifier grants a Polyglot stack - use during burst or when about to cap
Always check Polyglot before Ice phase ends to avoid waste

lessons.title: Fire Phase Execution
lessons.description: Master the damage phase: Fire IV spam, Despair finisher, and building Astral Soul for Flare Star.
keyPoints: Fire IV: Your main damage spell, doesn't refresh element timer
Despair: MP dump finisher, use when MP is too low for Fire IV
Fire IV builds Astral Soul stacks (6 needed for Flare Star)
Flare Star: Massive damage, requires 6 Astral Soul stacks
Typical Fire phase: Fire IV x6 -> Despair -> Flare Star
tips: Fire IV doesn't refresh timer - weave Fire/Paradox if timer is low
Despair dumps all remaining MP - always cast before switching to Ice

lessons.title: Ice Phase & Thunder
lessons.description: Master the recovery phase: Blizzard IV for Umbral Hearts, Thunder DoT management, and smooth transitions back to Fire.
keyPoints: Blizzard IV: Grants 3 Umbral Hearts, cast once per Ice phase
Thunder III/IV: Maintain DoT uptime, apply during Ice phase
Paradox: Instant in Umbral Ice 3, refreshes element timer
Ice phase is short - B4 -> Thunder -> Paradox/F3 -> back to Fire
tips: Thunder DoT should have nearly 100% uptime on boss
Paradox in UI3 is instant - use it for timer refresh or movement

lessons.title: Proc Management
lessons.description: Master Firestarter and Thunderhead procs: when to use them, when to hold them, and avoiding proc waste.
keyPoints: Firestarter: 40% chance from Fire IV, grants instant Fire III
Thunderhead: Grants instant Thunder III/IV, from Thunder casts
Procs last 30 seconds - don't let them expire unused
Use Firestarter for movement or to extend Fire phase
Thunderhead is your primary Thunder application method
tips: Plan proc usage around upcoming mechanics

lessons.title: Cooldown Optimization
lessons.description: Maximize damage with Ley Lines, Triplecast for movement, and Manafont for extended Fire phases.
keyPoints: Ley Lines: 15% cast speed buff zone for 30s (90s CD)
Triplecast: 3 instant casts (60s CD, 2 charges) - use for movement
Manafont: Instantly restores MP + grants Astral Fire (100s CD)
Use Manafont to extend Fire phase with extra Fire IVs
tips: Place Ley Lines where you can stay - don't waste them moving
Save Triplecast charges for mechanics requiring movement

lessons.title: Advanced Tactics
lessons.description: Final lesson: movement optimization, Xenoglossy decision-making, and AoE rotation with Flare and Foul.
keyPoints: Movement priority: Triplecast > Xenoglossy > Procs > Swiftcast
Xenoglossy: Instant 880 potency, use Polyglot stacks for movement or burst
AoE rotation: High Fire II spam in AF, Flare to finish, Foul in UI
For 3+ targets, switch to AoE rotation for efficiency
tips: Pre-plan movement - know when you'll need instant casts
Xenoglossy during party buffs > holding for movement that might not come
